purpose: Define the customer and tenant contract for a service that must operate with customer-specific policy, support, approval, and data boundaries.
hard_rules: A service may govern multiple customers, but each customer must have an isolated policy bundle reference.
Scoped cleanup must not be approved when the customer approval owner is undefined.
Customer data boundaries must remain explicit before launch-ready status is granted.
Customer and tenant contracts must remain auditable and replayable from immutable refs.
